description: German operations of Kry/Livi group. Offering video consultations with German doctors. Part of Kry's European expansion strategy. Growing but smaller than Swedish operations.
business_model: B2C - Direct to patients; exploring B2B
target_market: German consumers seeking digital healthcare access
key_investors: Index Ventures, Creandum, Accel, General Atlantic
competitive_advantage: Backed by well-funded group, proven tech platform, growing brand

varden_fit.rationale: Competitor in German market - watch for expansion into occupational health
